wan27_silent_idle_decision.approval: Wan 2.7 is approved for V1 silent visual idle clips only.
wan27_silent_idle_decision.scope: Short silent character presence clips for pause, repeat, listening, challenge, thinking, and reveal moments.
wan27_silent_idle_decision.out_of_scope: Lip-sync, audio-driven video, spoken character clips, and final scaled production pipeline.
wan27_silent_idle_decision.replicate_role: Replicate remains a test harness; future scaled production is expected to move to RunPod API.

blink_directive: blinking is optional; at most one quick, alert blink during the full 5-second clip; eyes reopen immediately; do not blink repeatedly; if blinking looks unnatural, keep eyes open and alert
global_positive_guidance: Calm but alert. Attentive eyes. Eyes stay alert and engaged. Expression is calm but interested. Quiet energy. Engaged presence. Looks involved in the learner's response. Not overly excited, but clearly present. Blinking should be rare. Eyes stay engaged without excessive blinking.
global_negative_guidance: No tired expression. No bored expression. No sleepy eyes. No heavy eyelids. No disinterest. No passive stare. No drooping eyelids. No low-energy face. No slow blink. Do not blink repeatedly. Do not blink more than once. If blinking looks unnatural, keep eyes open and alert. Eyes reopen immediately after blink.
media_handling: Generated videos remain in production Google Drive output folder, not in git.

clips.intended_use: V1 reusable 1:1 character idle base asset for Remotion composition.
clips.expression_direction: calm but alert, attentive, pleasant
clips.movement_direction: subtle breathing, blinking is optional; at most one quick, alert blink during the full 5-second clip; eyes reopen immediately; do not blink repeatedly; if blinking looks unnatural, keep eyes open and alert, tiny posture adjustment

clips.intended_use: V1 reusable 1:1 character idle base asset for Remotion composition.
clips.expression_direction: supportive, patient and engaged, present and attentive, gently encouraging
clips.movement_direction: subtle breathing, soft eye focus, blinking is optional; at most one quick, alert blink during the full 5-second clip; eyes reopen immediately; do not blink repeatedly; if blinking looks unnatural, keep eyes open and alert, tiny approving micro-expression

clips.intended_use: V1 reusable 1:1 character idle base asset for Remotion composition.
clips.expression_direction: focused, firm, calm but alert challenge energy
clips.movement_direction: controlled but present breathing, focused eye contact, blinking is optional; at most one quick, alert blink during the full 5-second clip; eyes reopen immediately; do not blink repeatedly; if blinking looks unnatural, keep eyes open and alert, very small head micro-adjustment

clips.intended_use: V1 reusable 1:1 character idle base asset for Remotion composition.
clips.expression_direction: actively listening with focused eyes, attentive, concentrated
clips.movement_direction: subtle breathing, small eye movement, blinking is optional; at most one quick, alert blink during the full 5-second clip; eyes reopen immediately; do not blink repeatedly; if blinking looks unnatural, keep eyes open and alert, tiny listening posture

clips.movement_direction: minimal breathing, blinking is optional; at most one quick, alert blink during the full 5-second clip; eyes reopen immediately; do not blink repeatedly; if blinking looks unnatural, keep eyes open and alert, tiny eye movement, very slight posture settling
